MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER TOY'S Motion To Validate Service Upon Defendants Damari Amade Pierson-Estus amd Haley Shinn is denied as unnecessary. Plaintiffs can seek to take the defaults of the defendants if they do not timely respond to the complaint or oppose a motion to quash if the defendants file such a motion. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order and comply with CRC 3.1312.
